title: Update test vectors for new SF selection, EMA, load_factor, hash_32, select_channel/now() in CCP spec
description: Child of the codereview beads. Add vectors for EMA calculation, load_factor=0.5/1.0 overrides, SNR boundary tests matching new table, hash_32 outputs, select_channel with ts=now(), density rationale cases. Parallel with spec edit. Must match all impls. bd create children for sf-ema, hash-consistency, channel-select if >5 cases.
